item.title: Kubernetes Dashboard
item.author: Author
item.description: Kubernetes Web UI Web UI By default, dashboard can access in the Cluster including your laptop. Kubernetes Web UI Deploying 1 kubectl apply -f https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kubernetes/dashboard/v2.2.0/aio/deploy/recommended.yaml Run Proxy 1 kubectl proxy Access Dashboard http://localhost:8001/api/v1/namespaces/kubernetes-dashboard/services/https:kubernetes-dashboard:/proxy/ Dashboard Authentication Web UI You can find the way to authenticate with dashboard.
